hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

b=$(git symbolic-ref --quiet --short HEAD) || exit 0; case "$b" in main|master) exit 0;; esac; git add -- src/components/sabcrm/20ui/composites/shell src/app/layout.tsx .claude/settings.json next.config.js 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git commit -q -m "checkpoint(shell): dock windowing auto-commit" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" || true
